title: Terminal Dogma
wikitext:
[[Image:23 inside terminal dogma.png|thumb|Inside Terminal Dogma ([[Episode 23]])]]'''Terminal Dogma''' is the lowest, most secret level of [[Nerv]] headquarters. It is located deep below<ref>Terminal Dogma is located 2008 meters below Central Dogma.  It is not entirely clear what level of the Nerv HQ complex Central Dogma is located on, but the ground level of the [[Geofront]] is 0.9 km below the surface city of Tokyo-3, so Terminal Dogma is roughly 3 km below the Earth's surface.</ref> [[Central Dogma]] accessible via. an Elevator, but only to those with the highest level of clearance ([[Gendo]], [[Fuyutsuki]], and [[Ritsuko Akagi]]).  Within Terminal Dogma is the "[[LCL]] Production Plant" -- actually, it's the live [[Angels|Angel]] [[Lilith]] crucified to a giant cross, and impaled on the [[Spear of Longinus]], Lilith's blood forming an entire lake of LCL. The Eva graveyard for failed prototype Evas, and the [[Dummy Plug Plant]] -- cloning facilities to produce copies of [[Rei Ayanami]], are also located here.<ref>It's mentioned that the Eva Graveyard and the Dummy Plug Plant are located deep within the "centre" of Central Dogma. It is not clear whether this implies Terminal Dogma or if it's simply in a lower level of Central Dogma.</ref>

==References==
<references/>

{{stub}}

[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Places]]
html:
Terminal Dogma is the lowest, most secret level of Nerv headquarters. It is located deep below[1] Central Dogma accessible via. an Elevator, but only to those with the highest level of clearance (Gendo, Fuyutsuki, and Ritsuko Akagi). Within Terminal Dogma is the "LCL Production Plant" -- actually, it's the live Angel Lilith crucified to a giant cross, and impaled on the Spear of Longinus, Lilith's blood forming an entire lake of LCL. The Eva graveyard for failed prototype Evas, and the Dummy Plug Plant -- cloning facilities to produce copies of Rei Ayanami, are also located here.[2]

References[edit]

  1. ↑ Terminal Dogma is located 2008 meters below Central Dogma. It is not entirely clear what level of the Nerv HQ complex Central Dogma is located on, but the ground level of the Geofront is 0.9 km below the surface city of Tokyo-3, so Terminal Dogma is roughly 3 km below the Earth's surface.
  2. ↑ It's mentioned that the Eva Graveyard and the Dummy Plug Plant are located deep within the "centre" of Central Dogma. It is not clear whether this implies Terminal Dogma or if it's simply in a lower level of Central Dogma.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

references.content: Terminal Dogma is located 2008 meters below Central Dogma.  It is not entirely clear what level of the Nerv HQ complex Central Dogma is located on, but the ground level of the [[Geofront]] is 0.9 km below the surface city of Tokyo-3, so Terminal Dogma is roughly 3 km below the Earth's surface.

It's mentioned that the Eva Graveyard and the Dummy Plug Plant are located deep within the "centre" of Central Dogma. It is not clear whether this implies Terminal Dogma or if it's simply in a lower level of Central Dogma.

Article: Terminal Dogma
thumb|Inside Terminal Dogma (Episode 23)Terminal Dogma is the lowest, most secret level of Nerv headquarters. It is located deep belowTerminal Dogma is located 2008 meters below Central Dogma.  It is not entirely clear what level of the Nerv HQ complex Central Dogma is located on, but the ground level of the Geofront is 0.9 km below the surface city of Tokyo-3, so Terminal Dogma is roughly 3 km below the Earth's surface. Central Dogma accessible via. an Elevator, but only to those with the highest level of clearance (Gendo, Fuyutsuki, and Ritsuko Akagi).  Within Terminal Dogma is the "LCL Production Plant" -- actually, it's the live Angel Lilith crucified to a giant cross, and impaled on the Spear of Longinus, Lilith's blood forming an entire lake of LCL. The Eva graveyard for failed prototype Evas, and the Dummy Plug Plant -- cloning facilities to produce copies of Rei Ayanami, are also located here.It's mentioned that the Eva Graveyard and the Dummy Plug Plant are located deep within the "centre" of Central Dogma. It is not clear whether this implies Terminal Dogma or if it's simply in a lower level of Central Dogma.
